server_description: Read-only Google Calendar access via Composio. Use GOOGLECALENDAR_FIND_FREE_SLOTS to check availability before quoting a time. Do NOT use this for creating events — use the book_reservation function tool instead.

name: book_reservation
description: Book a table in the restaurant's Google Calendar. Call ONLY after the caller has confirmed all details out loud.

name: end_call
description: End the call and hang up. Call ONLY after saying goodbye out loud. Do not call mid-conversation, only when the caller has clearly indicated the conversation is over (reservation confirmed and goodbyes exchanged, or caller said 'merci au revoir', etc.).
